name: Immunofluorescence Staining for Cryostat Sections
nameCn: 冰冻切片免疫荧光染色方案

usage.en: Immunofluorescence staining protocol for cryostat-sectioned frozen tissue with saponin-based permeabilization.
usage.zh: 冰冻切片免疫荧光染色方案，使用皂苷通透。

materials.name: Blocking buffer: PBS + 0.5% saponin + 2% BSA + 1% goat serum

components.name: Step 1: Fix tissue sections with 3.2% PFA (prewarmed at 37°C) for 15 min.
Step 2: Rinse 3× with PBS, 5 min each.
Step 3: Block for 30 min with blocking buffer (PBS + 0.5% saponin + 2% BSA + 1% goat serum).
Step 4: Prepare primary antibody in blocking buffer.

note.en: Typical: 1:200. Some antibodies (e.g. Ly6G 2 mg/mL): 1:800. Titrate if high background.
note.zh: 通常 1:200。某些抗体（如 Ly6G 2 mg/mL）：1:800。背景高则滴定优化。

components.name: Step 5: Incubate primary antibody overnight at 4°C.
Step 6: Wash 3× with PBS, 5 min each.
Step 7: Prepare secondary antibody (1:500 typical) in blocking buffer with DAPI (1:1000). Incubate 1 h at RT.

note.en: Some antibodies may need higher dilution to reduce background.
note.zh: 某些二抗可能需更高稀释倍数减少背景。

components.name: Step 9: Mount in anti-fade mounting buffer. Seal with nail polish. Dry overnight at RT.
Step 10: Image on fluorescence microscope, or store at -20°C for later use.

notes.en: Saponin-based blocking buffer is suitable for intracellular targets. For membrane-only targets, 0.1% Triton X-100 can substitute for saponin. Keep sections moist throughout — never let them dry. Use a humid dark box during antibody incubations.
notes.zh: 皂苷通透适合细胞内靶标。仅膜靶标可用 0.1% Triton X-100 替代皂苷。全程保持切片湿润——切勿干燥。抗体孵育时使用避光湿盒。

ref: Adapted from standard cryostat immunofluorescence protocol (2021)

note.en: Primary antibody incubation is overnight at 4°C — this is the natural stopping point
note.zh: 一抗 4°C 过夜孵育 — 这是自然的停顿点

note.en: Mounted and sealed slides can be stored at −20°C protected from light for weeks
note.zh: 封片后的载玻片可 −20°C 避光保存数周

detailedSteps.en: Fix cryostat tissue sections with 3.2% PFA (prewarmed to 37°C) for 15 min at RT
detailedSteps.zh: 用 3.2% PFA（预热至 37°C）固定冰冻切片，RT 孵育 15 min

detailedSteps.en: Rinse slides 3× with PBS, 5 min each wash
detailedSteps.zh: PBS 洗涤载玻片 3 次，每次 5 min

detailedSteps.en: Block for 30 min with blocking buffer (PBS + 0.5% saponin + 2% BSA + 1% goat serum) in humidity chamber
detailedSteps.zh: 在湿盒中用封闭液（PBS + 0.5% 皂苷 + 2% BSA + 1% 山羊血清）封闭 30 min

detailedSteps.en: Dilute primary antibody in blocking buffer (typical 1:200; titrate for specific antibodies). Apply to sections
detailedSteps.zh: 用封闭液稀释一抗（通常 1:200；特定抗体需滴定优化）。涂覆于切片上

detailedSteps.en: Incubate overnight at 4°C in sealed humidity chamber (dark box with water to prevent drying)
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C 避光湿盒中过夜孵育（盒内加水防止干燥）
PBS 洗涤 3 次，每次 5 min

detailedSteps.en: Prepare secondary antibody (1:500 typical) in blocking buffer with DAPI (1:1000). Apply to sections. Incubate 1 h at RT in humidity chamber, protected from light
detailedSteps.zh: 用封闭液配制二抗（通常 1:500）+ DAPI（1:1000）。涂覆于切片。RT 避光湿盒中孵育 1 h

detailedSteps.en: Wash 3× with PBS, 5 min each. Keep slides moist — never let sections dry
detailedSteps.zh: PBS 洗涤 3 次，每次 5 min。保持载玻片湿润——切勿让切片干燥

detailedSteps.en: Mount with anti-fade mounting medium. Seal edges with nail polish. Dry overnight at RT protected from light
detailedSteps.zh: 用抗荧光淬灭封片剂封片。指甲油封边。RT 避光过夜晾干

detailedSteps.en: Image on fluorescence/confocal microscope, or store slides at −20°C protected from light
detailedSteps.zh: 荧光/共聚焦显微镜成像，或 −20°C 避光保存

briefSteps.en: Fix PFA 15 min → wash 3× PBS → block 30 min (saponin/BSA/serum) → primary Ab overnight 4°C → wash 3× → secondary Ab + DAPI 1 h RT → wash 3× → mount anti-fade → seal → image
briefSteps.zh: PFA 固定 15 min → PBS 洗 3 次 → 封闭 30 min（皂苷/BSA/血清）→ 一抗 4°C 过夜 → 洗 3 次 → 二抗 + DAPI RT 1 h → 洗 3 次 → 抗淬灭封片 → 封边 → 成像
